subcodes.first_line: The very atoms have borne witness to the Revealer of Verses, while they that dwell behind the veils remain in grievous stupor, seized by heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الذرات لمنزل الایات و اهل الحجبات فی سکر عظیم قد اخذتهم الغفله علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @light and darkness
